releaseNotes: Performance & smoothness optimizations: aggressive Coil image caching (respecting headers disabled, RAM & disk-backed), Compose list key and recomposition fixes, ExoPlayer pre-warming (pre-buffering 15MB of consecutive episodes in the background), Manual Baseline Profiles compilation for smooth startup and scrolling, standard/premium playback routing, refined player resolution HUD styling, premium red loading spinner during seek/buffer, and pause ad suppression during seek.
